title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 07 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today，the main contract I2305 closed 840.5an decrease of 0.65% throughout the day;Some traders adopt separate quotations，steel mills purchased on demand. PBF at Shandong port dealt 850-865 yuan/mt; the same as yesterday ; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 857 yuan/mt; the same as yesterday; decreased 3 yuan/mt over yesterday. In the short term, the supply and demand of iron ore has changed little.
